name: ELB Learning (formerly eLearning Brothers)
description: ELB Learning emphasizes its commitment to enhancing learning experiences through custom eLearning solutions and comprehensive training programs. Their offerings include a range of products and services designed to meet diverse training needs, making them a valuable partner for businesses looking to innovate and improve their learning strategies.

name: eLearning Marketplace Ltd
description: The eLearning Marketplace is the UK's largest provider of immediate access online training, serving notable customers like the NHS and the Armed Forces. With a focus on blended and virtual learning solutions, they offer a secure and user-friendly platform for various stakeholders, including educational institutions and individual learners, to access accredited e-learning courses.

name: المركز الوطني للتعليم الإلكتروني | National eLearning Center
description: The National eLearning Center specializes in e-learning solutions and services, focusing on developing digital education technologies that enhance online learning experiences.

name: edureka!
description: The company offers a global online learning ecosystem for continuing education, providing high-quality instructor-led live online courses for working professionals.

name: ELC eLearning College
description: eLearning College is a prominent provider of distance learning education, offering a variety of accessible and affordable online courses. Their programs are ideal for individuals looking to enhance their careers or explore new interests.

name: Managing Director
description: e-Careers is a leading Edtech institution that revolutionizes the training industry through innovative online learning solutions. They offer a wide range of accredited courses and professional qualifications designed to support career development and address skill gaps in a flexible and accessible manner.

name: EDITORIAL eLEARNING
description: The company specializes in the development and adaptation of high-impact e-learning content and is a leading provider of vocational training for employment. They offer tailored e-learning solutions for businesses and training organizations, including content creation and a catalog of training specialties.

name: Edrona Learning
description: Edrona offers a wide range of e-learning opportunities, including online classes, job-ready certificates, and degree programs, aimed at fostering continuous learning and growth. Their platform features trending courses in various subjects, making it a comprehensive resource for individuals and institutions looking to enhance their skills and knowledge.

name: eLearning 23
description: eLearning 23 specializes in designing and developing customized Learning Management Systems (LMS) using the Moodle™ platform, enhancing the e-learning experience through seamless integration with mobile applications and collaboration tools. Their services focus on creating user-friendly and engaging online learning environments tailored to educational needs.

name: eLearning Media
description: eLearning Media has significantly enhanced our ability to deliver our entire academic offering securely and efficiently, providing a top-notch learning experience. They are official partners of various online training platforms and offer solutions for online assessment and videoconferencing for education.
